summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Housekeeping Module for Flowtym PMS. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 views verified - Direction (Dashboard KPI), Gouvernante (validation), Ménage (mobile), Maintenance (tickets), Petit-déjeuner (orders). All interactive features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/stats - Returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/tasks - Returns list of tasks with filters
Backend: GET /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/staff - Returns list of staff with role filter
Backend: GET /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/inspections - Returns list of inspections
Backend: GET /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/maintenance - Returns list of maintenance tickets
Backend: GET /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/breakfast - Returns list of breakfast orders
Backend: POST /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/tasks/{taskId}/start - Starts cleaning task
Backend: POST /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/tasks/{taskId}/complete - Completes task and creates inspection
Backend: POST /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/inspections/{inspId}/validate - Validates/refuses inspection
Backend: Error handling - Returns 404 for non-existent resources
Frontend: Navigation to /housekeeping works correctly
Frontend: Direction view displays KPIs (Progression, Départs, Validées, Maintenance)
Frontend: Direction view shows Plan des chambres by floor with VIP badges
Frontend: Direction view shows Équipe du jour with 3 active agents
Frontend: Direction view shows Alertes du jour (interventions urgentes, petit-déjeuner)
Frontend: Direction view shows Activité récente feed
Frontend: Gouvernante view displays Validation tab with inspections
Frontend: Gouvernante view displays Équipe tab with staff
Frontend: Gouvernante view displays Stocks tab with inventory
Frontend: Ménage (Mobile) view displays tasks by status (À faire, En cours, Fait)
Frontend: Ménage view shows staff header with task counts
Frontend: Maintenance view displays tickets by status (En attente, En cours, Résolus)
Frontend: Maintenance view shows priority badges (Haute, Basse)
Frontend: Petit-déjeuner view displays orders by status (Cuisine, Livraison, Servis)
Frontend: Task start action works - 'Démarrer' button triggers API and shows toast
Frontend: Maintenance start action works - 'Commencer' button updates ticket status
Frontend: Breakfast prepare action works - 'Préparé' button updates order status
critical_code_review_comments: Housekeeping module is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All 5 views (Direction, Gouvernante, Ménage, Maintenance, Petit-déjeuner) are functional
Navigation tabs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoints follow RESTful conventions with proper error handling
Real-time data refresh every 30 seconds is implemented
Mobile-optimized views (Ménage, Maintenance, Petit-déj) work on desktop as well
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via POST /api/housekeeping/hotels/{id}/seed - 7 staff, 8 tasks, 3 inspections, 3 maintenance tickets, 4 breakfast orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Housekeeping Module fully tested. 5 views: Direction (dashboard with KPIs, floor plan, activity feed, team), Gouvernante (validation, team, stocks), Ménage Mobile (task list by status), Maintenance Mobile (ticket list), Petit-déjeuner Mobile (order list). All CRUD operations work. Navigation tabs have data-testid: hk-nav-direction, hk-nav-gouvernante, hk-nav-housekeeping, hk-nav-maintenance, hk-nav-breakfast. Auto-refresh every 30s.

direction_dashboard.floor_plan: Rooms displayed by floor with VIP badges

breakfast_view.order_details: Guest name, formule, person count, boissons
